name: Mindful Dance Hands-Free VR
summary: 🌿Mindful Dance is a controller-free VR experience that combines slow, gentle movement with meditation music to help clear the mind, ease everyday stress, and encourage presence in the moment.   Follow a 3D instructor, replay movements in slow motion, and practice at your own pace.   With immersive environments, calming soundscapes, and intuitive tools to refine each flow, it feels like having a personal dance guide in VR.
